assessment.note: She names a clear pattern: strong execution but inconsistent early decision-shaping, which signals a meaningful clarity gap in how she is operating at Senior scope.

new_queue.label: Early decisions
new_queue.name: When did you miss the chance to shape a decision early?
new_queue.description: Anchors her pattern in a specific recent moment so the discussion moves from self-read to evidence.

new_queue.label: Impact beyond shipping
new_queue.name: When you look at the last quarter, where did your work change a decision or outcome beyond the analysis itself?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether she is framing impact in business terms rather than only delivered work.

new_queue.label: Stakeholder signal
new_queue.name: How did you decide when to bring stakeholders into the loop on the work?
new_queue.description: Tests whether she is raising signal proactively instead of waiting for others to notice.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Execution bias
new_queue.name: What do you think pulls you toward execution over influence in the moment?
new_queue.description: Explores whether the pattern is habit, context, or a deliberate tradeoff.

new_queue.label: Next-step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we’ve covered, what is the one change you want to make first?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete priority and commitment from the conversation.
